Handles both file format+telnet output format differences

name: Project.Pattern.Service.SignalPropagation
observations: Three-layer signal forwarding: NodeScanWidget → ScanTab → CommanderWindow
ScanTab forwards signals w/oprocessing: status_message.connect(self.status_me...
Enables loose coupling between UI layers

name: Project.Method.Worker.ComparisonWorker_run
observations: QThread worker for async telnet-based comparison
Workflow: check connection → auto-connect if needed → execute FBC command → p...
Timeout handling: 30s max for command execution

name: Project.Method.UI.NodeScanWidget_pause_auto_refresh
observations: Pauses auto-refresh timer w/odisabling checkbox
Sets _auto_refresh_paused = True, stops QTimer if running
Idempotent: safe to call multiple times

name: Project.Method.UI.NodeScanWidget_resume_auto_refresh
observations: Resumes auto-refresh timer if checkbox enabled
Sets _auto_refresh_paused = False, restarts QTimer if checkbox checked
Idempotent: safe to call multiple times

name: Project.Method.UI.ScanTab_status_message_routing
observations: Forwards status messages from NodeScanWidget to CommanderWindow
Signal connection in __init__: node_widget.status_message.connect(self.status...
Enables status bar updates from per-node widgets

name: Project.Bug.Parser.PIC0Separator_Detection
observations: TOTAL row separator for PIC 0 not detected in telnet output
Caused cell misalignment in comparison (off-by-one column shifts)
Root cause: Parser expected | PIC 0 | but telnet outputs | 0 | (w/oPIC prefix)

name: Project.Fix.Phase3.AutoConnect_Integration
observations: Auto-connect to telnet before comparison if not connected
Two-retry logic: initial connect + one retry on failure
Seamless UX: user doesn't need to manually connect before comparing

name: Project.Fix.Phase4.AutoRefresh_TabPause
observations: Auto-refresh continues executing when user switches tabs (Phase 4.1 problem)
Solution: Two-level pause logic (main tabs + node subtabs)
Modified 3 files: node_scan_widget.py (+30 lines), scan_tab.py (+38 lines), s...
